title: The Night Bride
writer: Frederick Chapin, Zelda Sears, Fred Stanley
actors: Marie Prevost, Harrison Ford, Franklin Pangborn
plot: Cynthia Stockton's roadster collides with that of Stanley Warrington, an author and woman-hater, on a one-way road, but he refuses to yield to her impetuous demands; appropriating a milkman's truck, she finally makes her way home....
